---
title: "Rsearch"
---

## Publications

- "Heterogeneous effects of Aid-for-Trade on donor exports: Why is Japan different?" (with Shuhei Nishitateno) ***Review of International Economics***, [Download](https://doi.org/10.1111/roie.12656)

## Working Papers

- "Wildfires, Pollution, and Pregnancy Outcomes: Evidence from Lightning Strikes" [Download](https://dx.doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.4833440) **Submitted**
